notes: Devnet-only artifacts; not externally audited. Official iden3/snarkjs published ptau integrity hash is Blake2b-512 (verified with b2sum): 58efc8bf2834d04768a3d7ffcd8e1e23d461561729beaac4e3e7a47829a1c9066d5320241e124a1a8e8aa6c75be0ba66f65bc8239a0542ed38e11276f6fdb4d9. ptau_hash_sha256 is the locally computed SHA-256 of the same Blake2b-verified ptau file. A single local Phase 2 contribution was used with 32 bytes from /dev/urandom; entropy was not printed, stored, or retained. Final .zkey is operator-controlled and kept outside the repo. Raw verification_key.json, proof.json, public.json, witness, zkey, r1cs, wasm, and ptau are not committed. canonical_proof_fixture_hash_sha256 records the proof artifact generated in this pass (real Anchor PDAs: pool_state=HcAkT4obzEEaHyevyVvmU7drEtSUg1m4XxF1VTWGoCdm, config=6DUXKzex1nLyFSvAfRRneaukfH1YXrQQ6t58vcYZpHJu); do not assume future proof regeneration is byte-for-byte deterministic unless deterministic proof randomness is explicitly introduced later.
